steps.title: Identify the vertex form
steps.content: The function is in vertex form $f(x)=(x-h)^{2}+k$ with vertex $(h,k)=(1,7)$. Since the squared term is $\ge 0$, the minimum occurs at $x=1$.

steps.title: State the minimum
steps.content: The minimum value is $7$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
